content: Supabase Storage RLS for multi-file-per-row (product photos) should follow the same folder-per-owner path pattern already used in this codebase for store-assets ({owner_id}/...), extended with a product/photo segment, e.g. {owner_id}/{product_id}/{filename}. storage.foldername(name)[1] = auth.uid()::text is sufficient for owner isolation without needing a JOIN to a metadata table -- JOIN-based hierarchical RLS is only recommended by Supabase docs for folder hierarchies more complex than a flat per-owner-then-per-product path, which this project does not need.
